src_data_text_contest_en.h.string_1: After this move, the user is\nmore easily startled.

src_data_text_contest_en.h.string_39: The appeal works well if the\nuser's condition is good.
src_data_text_contest_en.h.string_40: The next appeal can be made\nearlier next turn.
src_data_text_contest_en.h.string_41: The next appeal can be made\nlater next turn.
src_data_text_contest_en.h.string_42: Makes the next turn's order\nmore easily scrambled.
src_data_text_contest_en.h.string_43: Scrambles the order of\nappeals on the next turn.
